notes: Frequent crashes can be fixed by disabling Esync. Add PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command% as a launch option
title: Space Rangers HD: A War Apart
Space Rangers HD: A War Apart

notes:
working, 330-350 FPS in space, 60 in 3d battle, 1200+ in hyper


Game Settings (in game):

Multicore --> enable (better fps)
vsync --> disable (better fps)

in file:
"/home/$(whoami)/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Space Rangers HD A War Apart/CFG.TXT"

add string
AllowHardwareRenderUnderWine=Yes


 issues:

Alt+Tab --> Black-screen
need start "New Game" on real windows, after work fine .
3D battles work with minor glitch in loading screen, work fine after load
title: Space Rangers HD: A War Apart

notes: ~50 fps in space. Enable multicore and disable vsync in game settings. In file: "/home/user/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Space Rangers HD A War Apart/CFG.TXT" add string AllowHardwareRenderUnderWine=Yes. Add PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command% as a launch option.
title: Space Rangers HD: A War Apart

notes:
Disabling vsync really speeds up the game. However, literally reaching the first take-off into space, the game immediately break down.
I tried to disable many parameters in the graphics settings to improve performance. But this does not help.
title: Space Rangers HD: A War Apart
